free_text: Survey of (p,n) reactions at 12 MeV
.86 inch pole face diameter
The proton energy was degraded to 12 MeV by passing
the beam through an appropriate Cu-Absorber
Corrections for absorption in the air and in the
counter windows, for self-scattering and self-
absorption in the samples were made.
The quoted errors are the standard
deviations resulting from 4 to 12 irradiations each,
enlarged by from 10 to 20% to take account of  possible
additional beta-counting errors. Excluded are
systematic errors of decay scheme data.
